item.title: Bye Bye Boris
item.description: Boris Johnson was not just a stain on the UK, but on the whole world. He was/is a lying, sexist, incompetent bigot and I’m glad to see him go.

item.title: Starlight Cosplay - The Boys
item.description: Anyone else excited for the season finale?? Another look at my Starlight cosplay! I had a blast putting this one together, and didn't at all struggle finding the best way to get into it :P Also, T.H.T. Cosplay can never go wrong :D

item.title: Mayor Annie Gilland of Gervais Oregon.
item.description: This is her take on a school bond, intended to raise money for the school's heating system. She would rather see the public schools close, and force people into the church school. Anyone who asks questions or disagrees- gets treated like this.

item.title: It's for the best.
item.description: She drinks like a fish, she's antivax and she's financially irresponsible. She get's mad at everybody over the tiniest perceived slights. She keeps going through fertility treatments but won't quit drinking to give her body the best chance to support a pregnancy. As a result, she's using up doctor's time and insurance money. I don't even think she really want's kids, she won't adopt. She's just wants to keep up with her friends. I'm so glad that she won't be responsible for raising children. Just needed to get that out.............Whew!
item.dc:creator: dickblack12

item.title: Starfish Hitler. Yes you read that correctly.
item.dc:creator: DontTellMeWhatToDoBawbags

item.title: Speaking something into existence
item.description: (This post is more of a mental assertion on my part that i'm going to do it no matter how nervous I feel right now about it. If you'd like to stick around for the short story, welcome). A woman that I have been great friends with these past few months has completely taken up my field of view. Literally. I see nothing and pay attention to nobody else except her, and recent signs that I have been otherwise stupid for ignoring have delayed me doing this. Until now. An evening spent bowling with friends eventually turned into just us for a walk in the park late at night, when literally hours prior I had nearly spilled by feelings right then and there. She's smart, and im certain she knew where our conversations that night were going. But I didn't do it. The next day, a 4th of July fireworks show with friends again. We were somewhat late, and we never regrouped with them. It was just us. Another walk through gardens, our path illuminated only by the soft lights hanging above. It was that night when I dropped her home, that she spoke something to me in Japanese. I was surprised that she was fluent, and I had responded back in Greek "Goodnight" over text when I got home as a way of reciprocating. Apparently the Hellenic alphabet did not work on her phone, but she replied again in Japanese "I can't read it, but thank you. Goodnight". What she sent me next, by the source of several native speakers, translated into "It was a romantic time". And if that isn't a green light, then I don't know. But I am going to do it.
item.dc:creator: Mickey421

item.title: A pose a day: Face holding profile interrogation pose reference
item.description: Hi! I'm AdorkaStock. I photograph myself and others in various poses for art reference. My goal is to include in my galleries of stock poses a variety of body types, skin types, and people doing various things so there is a piece of stock for everyone. I want to share my stock, which is free to use for reference, with as many people as possible in case they need it! FAQ is in my bio. I hope this stock photo helps you. Happy drawing! MV edit: Heyyyyy everyone! Thanks for always showing the love. I don't have any super big projects going on right now to show you but you can always check out my shop for themed art packs (I have similar in a pack called the "romance pack" https://ko-fi.com/s/d0a10bdf52 ) or toss a lil support on Patreon (Patrons get requests too!) Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/adorkastock
item.dc:creator: adorkastock

item.title: Tired of reading the bible to figure out what happened?
item.dc:creator: blank666man

item.title: When did not aspiring to have kids become so taboo?
item.description: TLDR: Stop telling people they are immature or they're crazy or anything else insulting for choosing not to have kids. I'm almost 30. From the moment I got married at 24, my mother has been asking for grand babies. I never ever wanted kids, I knew this since I was 15. The world is chaotic, it's not sustainable, there is overpopulation, and living is fucking hard. Not to mention the medical risk it is for anyone to give birth, or the cost it would be to have a surrogate, or literally having a child out of moral obligation when you're not mentally prepared and how unfair that is to everyone in any situation. I'm not shittin on people who make it work and literally find their joy and purpose when they have a child, because I know being afraid and not wanting a baby can change when they're born. I know that happens. I have a friend who got pregnant early and I love her son, I'm so proud of her, there are literal super people out there doing this against all odds. It's just, if I chose not to have a child, how does that make me immature? If I die, my money, whatever little there is left because I plan on fucking living, won't get passed down, we won't leave a legacy, we won't continue our family bloodline etc etc. Why is that all important? I just wanna fucking live man, travel and for once not feel like I'm in a motherfuckin box of a life chained to money and obligations simply because society said that's 'normal'. Anyways. It was bothering me cuz posts like that were increasing lately, then I kept seeing El*n having his too many children and talking about repopulation because of the decline in births. But why on this dying overpopulated planet is that a fucking concern?
item.dc:creator: SaffronGin

item.title: Memes my SO and I send to each other v82
item.description:
It’s true.
He’s not wrong
Honestly yeah that would work
To be fair. It is Australia. They knew what they were getting into.
They must be lesbians. Only way to tell for sure is if the supervillain is like “I love u” and the hero goes “aww I love u too babe!” And then does nothing different.
I see absolutely no reason to get this for my 7 month old
It’s actually not inaccurate my therapist recommends this a lot
I’m asleep by then no thank u
Probably several things
They’re not wrong
She’s in jail for like 15 life sentences but I’m proud of her (she tried to poison her husband but he didn’t drink the drink and it got put into the punch bowl at a party and a bunch of people died)
I mean Jim and Pam are cute but I can see how they might both be like nah, Jim is like 80% of the cute
It’s easy! It’s fun! It’s free!
I love every single thing about this. That thing is even my favorite weapon. Not quite as useful as the shotgun but damn is it stylish
He’s right, she’s being absurd, date hobbits everyone
Keeper
God says a lot of things that nobody listens to, she is very wise
I hate my neighbors so much
AC is what I imagine it’s like to be a serf for a really chill lord
Mood. Personally I -am- a threat but I guess I don’t look threatening. Smh.
Disability Pride Month actually. Not that anyone cares.
IT (2022) with Beverly in butterfly clips and one of those crinkly crop tops in the flashbacks
It’s extremely nice. I lived in Rome for the summer. And it’s not exactly WALKABLE but like on my way to the bus to school I passed everything I needed. It was amazing.
I read “hetero help” and I was like bitch they don’t know
That kids autistic. I’m taking bets. He is exactly like me as a child
Yep. Especially when it comes to the female reproductive system. They’re just like “shrug” “can I offer you birth control pills that are super closely controlled for no reason?” “Or perhaps a mint? That will be 5,000$”
This counts. Probably.
Whoever sent this to me can’t crop for shit but they’re right
Divergent evolution technically. Just like fish.
This is how I operate. Out of sheer spite. Every time someone posts a mean comment I do another post and mock them on it.
Lizard tax! This is Queen Elizardbeth and I made those wings out of wire and leather scraps
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious

item.title: I want to know why he made these but I'm too afraid to axe
item.description: Maybe he just has an axe to grind
item.dc:creator: ruste

item.title: It's HER RIGHT!
item.description:
1
2
No, it's not clipped as some "nefarious conspiracy", she said a stupid thing and made no attempt to correct herself. This is one of our "best" and "brightest". Stop making excuses for the public servants who are paid more in an hour than rational coherent citizens make in a week. To read scripts. She's a terrible actor. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7cpA-lyGAI4 She obviously didn't mean she wanted to shoot her grandkids. And she obviously wasn't even paying attention to what she was spouting off. For people in the comments to even think others think that way must have a really bad grasp at picking up on sarcasm or running with a joke. There was a "report" yesterday from none other than the usual fascist network (you know the one). Kamala Harris gave a speech in front of a stage background where Louisiana was misspelled. I did a simple nostril air release. Their audience went crazy! As if it was her that made the background and spelling errors aren't constant throughout the (R) party. It's no 'peach-tree dish' or 'IMEACH JOE BIDEN' or misspelling United States of America on bills you threw together for people to take seriously. ANYWAY, Source: https://www.thedailybeast.com/gop-rep-debbie-lesko-is-mad-she-accidentally-said-she-would-shoot-her-own-grandchildren Brought to you by: "The best people" https://imgur.com/gallery/5k3JHlE https://imgur.com/gallery/9zDDKFT (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/LPyUdYF (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/7wxyNys (continued) Fox puppets laying out how to steal an election before actively commanding it: https://imgur.com/gallery/sQzDOlI
item.dc:creator: BlasphemousJones
